title: Dungeon Tooltips
body:
## A Resource Pack to bring MC Dungeon's Tooltips style to Java

![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d7b01c5a6443ff6963972a027b1d98de325d7fe.png)
### FAQ:
1, My tooltips look weird/text is outside of the tooltips.
  - If you're using Legendary Tooltips, use these versions [[Big](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dungeon-tooltips/version/qZfKKgWb)] | [[Small](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dungeon-tooltips/version/1.0.0)]

2, Is there a version that's compatible with Wynncraft?
  - Yes I gotchu [[Big](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dungeon-tooltips/version/HYVP3Q0E)] | [[Small](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dungeon-tooltips/version/zWtY2OAJ)]

3, What if I'm using the Legendary Tooltips mod with Wynncraft?
  - No worries, I gotchu [[Big](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dungeon-tooltips/version/uJE4jOA0)] | [[Small](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dungeon-tooltips/version/IxwFw9nv)]

4, Why is only Wynncraft supported?
  - Because that's the only server I'm playing on right now


### Credits:
The pack was made using [this tool](https://github.com/Godlander/tooltip)
